name: Abyss The Forgotten Past
short_description: Play as Leonnor who sets out on a journey to discover everything about his past and his world, things are not always what they seem! Learn special abilities, battle monsters and encounter celestial beings as you explore this beautifically crafted pixel world.
detailed_description:
Try Abyss The Forgetten Past For Free


About the Game

ABOUT THE GAME


Skeletons, Celestial Beings, Magic Swords and a vast beautiful world created in pixel art. All this together with an adventure full of mysteries and puzzles that cannot be told in just one story. Here is a brief summary of what can be found in Abyss The Forgotten Past.

Abyss The Forgotten Past, is a 2D platform game with RPG-based mechanics, with a large diversity of collectible items, increasing the difficulty as you progress. Enemies may look silly, but they are very smart, so be careful!

The plot was initially based on a table RPG game played in real life. The story is based on rediscovering itself, after an unfortunate event, Leonnor sets out on a journey to discover everything about his past, with special abilities, where monsters, magic and heavenly beings exist. Enter a personal search that will surprise you with each discovery ...

Gameplay features


-A mysterious and captivating plot, discover everything about Leonnor's past and this world, things are not always what they seem ...

-Multiple levels, items and monsters (More in future updates).

-A soundtrack that matches each type of stage or situation.

-You can play on the keyboard or on your console control!

-Several types of weapons (some with magical properties).

-The Legendary Excalibur Sword can be found in the game!

-Beautiful Pixel art graphics and animations

-Puzzles and challenges.

-RPG systems (Inventory, levels, weapons forging and etc ...).

-Developed for Windows (Mac, Linux and Android coming soon).
